scripts.clean: bun run clean:cache && bun run clean:ports
scripts.dev: bun install && bun install --cwd ../backend && bun install --cwd ../frontend && bun run clean && concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "bun run --cwd ../backend dev" "bun run --cwd ../frontend dev"
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd ../frontend lint && bun run --cwd ../backend lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd ../frontend lint:fix && bun run --cwd ../backend lint:fix
scripts.type-check: bun run --cwd ../frontend type-check && bun run --cwd ../backend type-check
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run type-check
scripts.verify:frontend: bun run --cwd ../frontend lint && bun run --cwd ../frontend type-check
scripts.verify:backend: bun run --cwd ../backend lint && bun run --cwd ../backend type-check
scripts.build:all: bun run verify && bun run --cwd ../backend build && bun run --cwd ../frontend build
scripts.prod: bun run --cwd ../backend start & bun run --cwd ../frontend start
